zh.Shrivenham, Berkshire, England: 英國波克夏史利文哈姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Hinton於1488年8月21日出生在英國波克夏時，他的父親Richard De Hynton28歲，母親Sarah Colemare21歲。他於1509年與Joan Francklyn結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1550年1月7日在英國波克夏史利文哈姆享年61歲，埋葬在英國波克夏史利文哈姆。

zh-hans.Shrivenham, Berkshire, England: 英国波克夏史利文哈姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Hinton于1488年8月21日出生在英国波克夏时，他的父亲Richard De Hynton28岁，母亲Sarah Colemare21岁。他于1509年与Joan Francklyn结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1550年1月7日在英国波克夏史利文哈姆享年61岁，埋葬在英国波克夏史利文哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Hinton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the many places called Hinton (for example, in Shropshire, Herefordshire, Gloucestershire, Somerset, Hampshire, and Northamptonshire). Some of the placenames, such as those in Northamptonshire, Shropshire, and Herefordshire, derive from Old English hīna, genitive plural form of hīwan ‘household, religious community’, + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’ (compare Hine as the first element). Others, such as those in Gloucestershire, Somerset, and Hampshire, derive from Old English hēan, dative form of hēah ‘high’ + tūn.

variants.name: Hine
meanings: English (Devon): occupational name from Middle English, Old English hīne ‘servant, member of a household’, also ‘farm laborer’ (such as a herdsman or shepherd). Originally a collective term for a body of servants, from an Old English plural noun, hīwan ‘household’, in early modern English it commonly acquired excrescent -d (see Hinde ). Evidence from Nottinghamshire shows that some bearers of the name were wealthy freemen, which suggests that their eponymous ancestors were not farmhands but senior members of a lord's household. From the late 15th century onward in western England, from south to north, a hine or hind also denoted a farm steward or manager, a sense that may be relevant to the surname in northwestern England, where hereditary naming had not been fully established by the 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When John Hinton was born on 21 August 1488, in Berkshire, England, his father, Richard De Hynton, was 28 and his mother, Sarah Colemare, was 21. He married Joan Francklyn in 1509. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 7 January 1550, in Shrivenham, Berkshire, England, at the age of 61, and was buried in Shrivenham, Berkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Hinton est né le 21 août 1488, à Berkshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard De Hynton, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Sarah Colemare, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Joan Francklyn en 1509. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 7 janvier 1550, à Shrivenham, Berkshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Shrivenham, Berkshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Hinton am 21. August 1488 in Berkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard De Hynton 28 und seine Mutter Sarah Colemare 21. Er hat 1509 Joan Francklyn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 7. Januar 1550 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Shrivenham, Berkshire, England und wurde in Shrivenham, Berkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Hinton è nato il il 21 agosto 1488 nel Berkshire, England, il suo padre, Richard De Hynton, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Sarah Colemare, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Joan Francklyn nel 1509. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 7 gennaio 1550, nel Shrivenham, Berkshire, England, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolto a Shrivenham, Berkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Hintonが1488年8月21日にイギリスバークシュアイアで生まれた時，父Richard De Hyntonは28歳，母Sarah Colemareは21歳であった。1509年にJoan Francklynと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1550年1月7日にイギリスバークシュアイアシュリベンハムで61歳で死去し，イギリスバークシュアイアシュリベンハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Hinton(이)가 1488년 8월 21일 영국 버크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard De Hynton(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Sarah Colemare(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1509년 Joan Francklyn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1550년 1월 7일 영국 버크실르 슈라이븐함에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 버크실르 슈라이븐함에 묻혔다.

pt.21 August 1488–7 January 1550: 21 de agosto de 1488–7 de janeiro de 1550
pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Hinton nasceu em 21 de agosto de 1488, em Berkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard De Hynton, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Sarah Colemare, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Francklyn em 1509. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 7 de janeiro de 1550, em Shrivenham, Berkshire, Inglaterra, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em Shrivenham, Berkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Hinton родился 21 августа 1488 г. в местности биркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard De Hynton было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Sarah Colemare, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Francklyn в 1509 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 7 января 1550 г. в местности шривенам, биркшир, Англия в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности шривенам, биркшир, Англия.

es.21 August 1488–7 January 1550: 21 de agosto de 1488–7 de enero de 1550
es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Hinton nació el 21 de agosto de 1488, en Berkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard De Hynton, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Sarah Colemare, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Joan Francklyn en 1509. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 7 de enero de 1550, en Shrivenham, Berkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultado en Shrivenham, Berkshire, Inglaterra.
